full_text:
Fei Yi (Wenwei) 費禕 (文偉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fei Yi (費禕), styledWenwei (文偉), was born in Meng, Jiangxia. Shu official. Took over affairs of state after Jiang Wan’s death. Fei Yi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Fei Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
